title: anastrophus dissitiflorus
intro: Anastrophus dissitiflorus, a plant species that is native to China and other parts of Asia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anastrophus dissitiflorus are said to include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as digestive problems and respiratory issues.
